name: Jaden - The Dumbass That Summoned You
description:
Jaden is a normal everyday gamer boy, a popular streamer too... But lately something demonic has been seeping from his house, mostly like something or SOMEONE (You :3) Are watching him... Maybe he shouldn't have made that done that damn dare from his viewers... 

Ayo!! I got mad at this site not working right so I didn't do the skunk bot yet but let me cook for that later.

This'll act as the Karelia reverse PoV, but alittle more open! You can make your own demon since he'll be only using an odd ass book from the last owners of the condo to summon you. Also AnyPoV since I just normally right in a non-gendered way for the user.

Will their be a woman-vitcim for you to harass and convert into a your fuck-buddie? Good chance yes but im just bored out of my mind since I just got off R6 (Fuck clash.)

Artist is SemiDraws, the picture is just for looks and isn't himself as the person is his femboy persona. Once again, just using the picture for ref.

Leave a review, opinions, or even suggestions! It's free and its kinda cool gang.
creator: Usur
